tools.name: list_invoices
tools.description: Search and list invoices with optional filters. Returns a list of invoice summaries.

status.description: Filter by invoice status. Use 'all' to include every status. Defaults to 'all' if omitted.

vendor.description: Filter by vendor name (case-insensitive partial match).

min_amount.description: Minimum invoice amount (inclusive). Filters in the invoice's native currency.

max_amount.description: Maximum invoice amount (inclusive). Filters in the invoice's native currency.

tools.name: get_invoice
tools.description: Get full details of a specific invoice by its ID.

tools.name: approve_invoice
tools.description: Approve a pending invoice for payment. Only invoices with status 'pending' can be approved. This action is irreversible.

invoice_id.description: The ID of the invoice to approve.

tools.name: send_notification
tools.description: Send a notification message to a Slack channel or user.

channel.description: The Slack channel (e.g., '#finance') or user handle (e.g., '@cfo').

tools.name: get_current_user
tools.description: Get information about the currently authenticated user, including name, role, and permissions.
